overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Batman walking through a rain-soaked urban environment during a stormy night. The character moves along wet sidewalks beneath building overhangs, with a burning skyscraper visible in the distance, creating a dark, atmospheric scene with high-end game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under modern office building

events.description: burning skyscraper in distance becomes visible through the haze and rain

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily along the covered sidewalk with cape flowing, moving toward the distant burning building

entered.detail: Modern building with concrete columns and overhang providing shelter from rain
Reflective glass facade of the office building showing interior lights
Tall street light illuminating the wet pavement with artificial light
Metal railing fence running along the right side of the walkway
Distant skyscraper engulfed in orange flames and smoke visible through the storm

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Batman walking under a covered urban walkway during a heavy storm. The modern glass and concrete building provides partial shelter on the left, while a metal fence lines the right. Through the rain and haze, a burning skyscraper becomes visible in the distance, casting an ominous orange glow against the dark storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with construction barrels near street intersection

events.description: exits the covered walkway into more open area with construction barrels visible

agents.ego_description: continues walking past orange traffic barrels positioned along the sidewalk edge

entered.detail: Orange and white striped construction barrels lined along the curb
Street sign visible above the road in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the covered walkway, the scene opens to a more exposed urban street. Orange construction barrels line the right side of the wet sidewalk. The burning skyscraper looms larger in the center view as the camera advances, with street lights now positioned to the right. The environment feels more open but remains devoid of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark urban street canyon with tall building facade

events.description: entering darker section of street with reduced ambient light from building shadow
vehicle drives past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker section of street, glancing slightly toward the building entrance on the left

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet asphalt street, headlights visible through the rain

entered.detail: Dark modern building with reflective windows and minimal lighting
Illuminated entranceway with glass doors on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a darker urban canyon with a tall building facade on the left featuring a lit entranceway. The traffic barrels are left behind as a car drives past on the wet street to the right. The burning skyscraper dominates the center view, now much closer and more detailed through the stormy haze, while the overall lighting becomes darker and more ominous.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked city that transitions from a sheltered walkway into an exposed, ominous urban canyon. It begins with Batman walking under a covered glass and concrete overhang, where a burning skyscraper first appears as a distant orange glow through the heavy storm. As the camera moves out from the shelter, the scene opens onto a wet sidewalk lined with orange construction barrels and street lights, bringing the towering inferno into sharper focus. The environment then shifts into a darker urban corridor, passing a lit building entrance as a car drives by on the glistening street. Finally, the camera advances deeper into the gloom, where the burning skyscraper dominates the center view, looming large and detailed through the stormy haze.
